title: crataegus mollis f. dumetosa
intro: Crataegus mollis f. dumetosa, also known as hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its thorny branches and clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crataegus mollis f. dumetosa include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood lipid profiles, and supporting the health of blood vessels. Crataegus mollis f. dumetosa can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, with the flowers and leaves being commonly used in herbal remedies.
